pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-015 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) scores 0.444 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.444) and is edge_case for the Data Privacy Specialist role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for specialist-level Data Privacy Specialist.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, DDaT signal (0.444), and AI and Machine Learning handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI/ML competencies for Data Privacy Specialist at specialist level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI/ML overlap appears in 15-40% of Data Privacy Specialist postings depending on seniority. Core signals: 0. OOS signals: 0.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI/ML content without sufficient core signals is not market-supported for Data Privacy Specialist. Final decision: exclude.
